FLOW.COMMENT: z_logQueue - log a queueing message to a transaction's queue file in support of failsafe mode for the 28000

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_logQueue - log a queueing message to a transaction's queue file in support of failsafe mode for the 28000

MAP.COMMENT: remove all \r and \n from sMessage because this will be used as the delimeter

MAP.NAME: START
MAP.COMMENT: do nothing - do not append a \r\n to the START message since this will be the last message in a queue file

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: add a \r\n to the end of the message
